summary: Tested FITSIOMAX OS v3 backend and frontend on public URL for requested role, sheets, pipeline, branch booking, appointment completion, and board flows. Backend pytest: 9/10 passed. UI e2e validated most flows end-to-end, but Head Physio/Physio appointment visibility is broken.

critical.issue: Returns empty list despite existing branch appointments; Head Physio cannot view today's/new appointments.

ui_bugs.issue: No appointment rows visible and no complete action available, even after successful branch booking in same run.
Console hydration warning indicates invalid DOM nesting (<span> inside <option>), causing unstable select interactions.

integration_issues.issue: Backend filters /api/v3/appointments by user.branch_id for roles branch_admin/head_physio/physio; seeded head_physio/physio users have branch_id null, so they cannot see branch appointments.
Repeated 403s in browser console due global loadAll calling restricted endpoints for non-authorized roles (errors swallowed by safeCall).

action_items: Assign branch_id to headphysio@fitsiomax.com and physio@fitsiomax.com (or adjust v3 appointment query logic) so today/new appointment views work.
Fix role-aware data fetching in frontend (avoid firing unauthorized role endpoints in loadAll).
Fix invalid option rendering in branch available-doctor select to remove hydration warning and improve reliability.
Retest head physio and physio appointment visibility and completion after fixes.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py is very large (>2000 lines); split v1/v2/v3 domains into modular routers/services.
Role-seeded users in v3 are created without branch_id, but downstream authorization/query logic assumes branch binding for operational roles.
Current frontend loadAll pattern makes role-forbidden API calls by design; this inflates 403 noise and can hide real integration errors.
seed_data_creation: Created AUTO/TEST data via API/UI: branches + branch admins, doctors + slots, manual leads, sheet connections/mapping/sync imports, booked appointments.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Most requested v3 flows are validated working: all 6 role logins, role tabs, BD sheet connection+mapping+sync with source_tab, manual lead creation, pre-sales qualify+assign, branch admin confirm+available-doctor booking, branch creation with admin credentials, and board counters. Primary blocker remains head_physio/physio appointment visibility due branch_id linkage.
rca of the issue: Reproduced via backend pytest and UI automation. Appointments are created successfully for branch-bound leads, but /api/v3/appointments applies query['branch_id']=user.branch_id for head_physio/physio roles. Seeded users headphysio@fitsiomax.com and physio@fitsiomax.com have branch_id=None, therefore query returns zero rows. Mitigation: set proper branch_id during seed/branch staff creation, or support role-to-branch assignment before enabling appointment views.
